caption: A screen-sharing session displays a complex digital mind map on a dark background, featuring interconnected nodes and a central white rectangular image. This image contains a black-and-white illustration of figures and legible text that reads "YOU TOO deserve just" and "YOUR voice needs space". Around this central box, several circular nodes are visible, including one with the text "think thinking". The browser tabs at the top of the window include titles such as "Trail Learning by Systemenly", "Elements by Systemenly", "Future of Society by Systemenly", "Insights Introduction Kumu", and "Rural Community Food System". In the top right corner of the screen, a small video feed shows a man wearing a dark hat and a dark shirt. Throughout the sequence, the screen remains static, with the mind map and the man's video feed staying in the same position without any movement or changes in the displayed content.
